# thoth_endpoints (Data Source)

Reads endpoint inventory with optional environment and fleet filters.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `environment` (String) Optional environment filter (for example: dev, staging, prod).
- `fleet_id` (String) Optional fleet ID filter.

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Endpoint rows as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total endpoints returned after filters.
